untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calculation of exponential decay parameter θ and half-life (ln(2)/θ) via time-series analysis, which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators. The optimal holding period is derived from mean-reversion half-life, not a fixed parameter. Z-score is used as a proxy for mean-reversion detection, but the precise half-life calculation and dynamic holding period cannot be implemented without custom statistical computation.
translation_notes: Translated 'spread deviates significantly from mean' using zscore_20 with threshold of ±2σ as a mean-reversion trigger. Exit when spread reverts toward mean (zscore crossing back toward 0). Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT because the signal trades both long and short depending on whether the spread is above or below its mean. The critical half-life parameter and θ calculation are not available in the standard indicator set and would require custom implementation in the backtest engine.
